---
title: "Red Argentina de Monitoreo de <br> Fauna Atropellada (RAMFA)"
---

<style>
  .iframe-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding-top: 56.25%; /* Relación de aspecto 16:9 */
  }
  .responsive-iframe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="iframe-container">
  <iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://ramfa-landing-page.base44.app/"></iframe>
</div>

[Ver en pantalla completa](https://ramfa-landing-page.base44.app/){target="_blank"}
